lastDeploy.summary: BRIDGE workflow adoption: vertical slices, Playwright E2E, requirements traceability
highlights: Extracted App.jsx into hooks and components (vertical slices)
Playwright schedule-flow E2E: preset switch, ICS export, backup download
docs/requirements.json and docs/context.json for BRIDGE traceability
Vitest isolated from E2E via separate test configs
recentCommits: 46ba19b Adopt BRIDGE workflow: docs, E2E gate, and App vertical slices.

completed: Public one-page generator SPA deployed to Vercel
Three built-in presets plus save-your-own custom presets
ICS calendar export (core, free forever)
Print-friendly checklist view
Export Preview sidebar (first-occurrence simulation, not a to-do list)
JSON backup and restore with normalization
Theme system with legacy dark-mode migration
Task validation, clamping, and natural-language parsing
Feature-flag infrastructure for monetization (VITE_FEATURE_*)
Monetization catalog in src/config/monetization.js
Brand assets in public/ (logo.png, logo-light.png, favicons, og-image.png, lockscreen SVG)
36 Vitest unit tests across 5 lib modules (buildIcs, backup, storage, themes, tasks)
Playwright E2E smoke test: preset select → edit task → ICS export → backup download
Interest form UI built (modal + footer card) — awaiting endpoint activation
Print upsell UI built but feature-flagged off
Owner preview mode (?preview=monetization) for gated UI testing
BRIDGE pre-deploy gate (docs/BRIDGE-GATE.md)
docs/requirements.json acceptance-test traceability with vitest/e2e/manual verify fields
App.jsx vertical slices: AppHeader, TaskTable, useSchedulePersistence, useNotifications, schedulePreview
E2E coverage mapped in requirements.json (schedule-flow)

blocked.reason: Domain not purchased; production serves from neatclock.vercel.app
VITE_INTEREST_FORM_ENDPOINT not set on production; Formspree/FormSubmit account activation pending
Gumroad products, ZIP deliverables, and VITE_PRINTS_* URLs not created; VITE_FEATURE_NEATCLOCK_PRINTS remains off
Vercel Hobby plan is non-commercial only; upgrade to Pro before enabling live Gumroad print CTAs
VITE_FEATURE_PREMIUM_THEMES off; optional launch tied to print bundle
Flags off; Amazon Associates tag and sponsor outreach not started

nextSession: Purchase neatclock.app and wire via Vercel Domains
Activate Formspree/FormSubmit endpoint and set VITE_INTEREST_FORM_ENDPOINT on Vercel
Create Gumroad print pack products and ZIP assets per design-system/BRAND-BRIEF.md
Upgrade Vercel to Pro before enabling live Gumroad print CTAs
